title: pothavillaye lyrics mudinja ivana pudi
stanzas:
naal muzhukka unnai
kangal thindra pinnum
unthan sorkal reithu
naan nanaitha pinnum

innum innum pakkam vanthum
kittathatta oddi kondum
moochil theeyum
patri kondum...mm

theaneerai naam urinjum
maalai pothathe
kai korthu poga intha
saalai pothathe

en enana vinkalam naan sollave
kaipeasi minkalam pothathadi
un azhakai paruga en kangal pothathadi
en nilaiyai ezhutha vaanangal pothathadi

nera mullai pin izhuthum
vaaram ettu naal koduthum
sutrum bhoomiyai thaduthathea

thonnooru aandugal nee keatkiroy
genmangal aayiram pothathada
nam kanavai sethukka
pearandam pothathada
ivvulagil irukkum
deivangal pothathada

kuddi kuddi kobam kondu
kaddi muddi mothi kondu
thiddi thiddi theertha pinnum...mm

shswasha paiyil unthan
vaasam pooddi vaithum
nencha yeaddil yeangum
un pearai theeddi vaithum

paadal theerntha pona pinnum
mounam kooda theerntha pinnum
kodi muththam vaitha pinnum..mm

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pothavillaye'?

The song 'Pothavillaye' expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the absence of a beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Mudinja Ivana Pudi, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and connection with their love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shreya Goshal and composed by D Imman.

When was 'Pothavillaye' released?

'Pothavillaye' was released on August 12, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Pothavillaye' from the movie Mudinja Ivana Pudi beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing. It portrays the protagonist's emotional turmoil as they yearn for their beloved, making it a poignant piece in the film. With Shreya Goshal's soulful rendition and D Imman's melodic composition, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotion. This track is perfect for romantic occasions, resonating with anyone who has experienced love's bittersweet moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pothavillaye from Mudinja Ivana Pudi is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Shreya Goshal's enchanting vocals, combined with D Imman's soulful composition, create a captivating listening experience. This song beautifully conveys the emotions of yearning and connection, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: There is no one like you, there is no one like you, there is nothing like your presence.
Throughout the day, even after seeing you, your words linger in my mind.
Even if I come closer, I can't catch you, and the smoke of the fire is also elusive.
There is no one like you, there is no one like you, there is nothing like your presence.
We will not let the sweet water flow away, we will hold on to this path and not let it go.
I will express my feelings, my hands will write about your beauty, my eyes will see your beauty, my state will be written in the skies.
The thorny bushes will give way, and the earth will be cleared for seven days.
There is no one like you, there is no one like you, there is nothing like your presence.
The song of the children is not to be ignored, and the pride of the community should not be overlooked.
You are asking about the hundred men, the thousands of dreams that we have, and the gods that exist in this world.
With anger in groups, we will gather and resolve everything slowly.
There is no one like you, there is no one like you, there is nothing like your presence.
Your fragrance is like a gentle breeze, and I search for your name in my thoughts.
After the song ends, even silence feels complete, and after a kiss, everything feels complete.
There is no one like you, there is no one like you, there is nothing like your presence.
